reviews.comment:
Tiene todo lo principal para el viajero al paso, la atención es agradable y dispone de un lugar al aire libre para relajarse un rato.

(Translated by Google)
It has everything essential for the passing traveler, the service is friendly, and it has an outdoor area to relax for a while.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención.  Las empanadas de carne y pollo estaban exquisitas.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The meat and chicken empanadas were delicious.

reviews.comment:
Muy congestionada en temporada alta, no priorizan al socio, todo da lo mismo. Decidan ustedes!!
Les saco una estrella, por que un año despues todo sigue igual o peor!!

(Translated by Google)
Very crowded in high season, they don't prioritize members, everything is the same. You decide! I'm taking away one star because a year later everything is the same or worse!

reviews.comment:
Mucha gentr para comprar y 1 sola cajera. Saben q estan en temporada de viajes y estaría bueno q busquen mas personal.
No hay variedad de comida  vegetariana

(Translated by Google)
Lots of people shopping and only one cashier. They know it's peak travel season, and it would be nice if they hired more staff.
There's no vegetarian menu.
